job_title: Remote Healthcare Data Analyst: Clinical Insights & AI
job_description:
# Remote Healthcare Data Analyst: Clinical Insights & AI
Company: Lucem Health Inc.
Source: ZipRecruiter
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 19, 2026
URL: https://www.ziprecruiter.com/c/Lucem-Health-Inc./Job/Remote-Healthcare-Data-Analyst%3A-Clinical-Insights-%26-AI/-in-Charlotte%2CNC?jid=8cbf48fa5b00173e

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare technology contract role focused on clinical insights and AI-enabled health data workflows.
- Responsibilities include analyzing clinical workflows, synthesizing health data, and ensuring the accuracy of reporting tools.
- Requires SQL, analytical skills, communication, and collaboration with clinicians and product teams.
strengths: Strong healthcare data analysis, SQL, reporting accuracy, and cross-functional collaboration alignment.
AI/clinical insights theme fits the requested AI-assisted analytics direction without demanding prompt engineering as the core job.
Remote contract role with potential permanent placement.
gaps: Clinical workflow/product-team context is stronger than the base payer/ETL focus.
AI responsibilities are not deeply specified; keep resume language grounded in data quality and reporting validation.
notes: Apply if contract work is acceptable. Tailor toward healthcare data analysis, SQL, reporting accuracy, clinical/product stakeholder support, and AI-assisted insight workflows.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | Clinical Insights | SQL Reporting Quality
